case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,900.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: (AMENDED) CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT DANG, HUNG
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-24-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,900.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY JONAH CHEW ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT HUNG DANG. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
